## Validation

- [ ] `pyright src/` exits cleanly (or explanation provided)
- [ ] `python scripts/test_agent_end_to_end.py` passes
- [ ] `.env` is not committed
- [ ] Relevant wiki page is updated if behavior changed
- [ ] `.env.example` is updated if new env vars were added
- [ ] PR touches one logical concern only
